task_objective: Fix the games dropdown layout so that it spans the full width and matches the position of other buttons in the plugin menu under Decky 3.2.4 / SteamOS UI updates.
design_decisions: Applied layout="below" to the DropdownItem component inside the GAME PanelSection of src/index.tsx.
This utilizes the native layout structure of Steam Gamepad UI (Item layout='below') to place the dropdown selector control on its own row, spanning the full width of the Quick Access Menu panel.
Added a new static assertion test in test_frontend_static.py to verify and enforce this layout property on DropdownItem.
results: Games dropdown now spans the full width and matches the positioning of other button items.
All tests (371 total) pass, quality control lint/format checks pass, typescript builds and packages cleanly.
